title: Bitcoin - need to resync at every login (temporary)

actions.value:
Hi,
we are aware of a bug with old Airbitz accounts in which Bitcoin wallets need to be resynced at every login in order to display the correct balance and transaction list.
Our engineers are working on that, meanwhile we have a temporary solution.

Please follow these steps:
1. Login and tap on "+" symbol
2. Select Bitcoin and create a new Bitcoin Segwit wallet
3. Open the old Bitcoin wallet, tap Send, tap Myself, select the new Bitcoin wallet.
5. Tap Amount, tap Max and Slide to confirm.

Your funds will be stored in the new wallet inside the same Edge account.

You will be able to use again your old wallet if you want, but it will need to be resynced at every login until the fix.

raw_title: Bitcoin - need to resync at every login (temporary)
